title: Modern equivalents and adjacent health UI source set
scope_note: Current external sources used to document modern equivalents, successors, and adjacent standards relevant to Microsoft Health CUI. These are not treated as part of the canonical historical Health CUI corpus.

files.title: NHS Digital service manual home
files.trust_note: Official NHS England service manual. Current guidance may change; this local copy records the 2026-04-25 retrieval.

files.title: NHS Digital service manual design system
files.trust_note: Official NHS England design-system page for public and staff digital services.

files.title: NHS service standard
files.trust_note: Official NHS England service standard page, including health-specific points for clinical safety and interoperability.

files.title: NHS App design system home
files.trust_note: Official NHS App design-system page. Relevant to patient-facing NHS App surfaces, not a clinician-facing EHR standard.

files.title: NHS App design system components
files.trust_note: Official NHS App component index, used to understand component-scope boundaries.

files.title: NHS App design system patterns
files.trust_note: Official NHS App pattern index, used to understand pattern-scope boundaries.

files.title: NHS England digital clinical safety assurance
files.trust_note: Official NHS England guidance explaining DCB0129 and DCB0160 for clinical risk management.

files.title: Review of digital clinical safety standards DCB0129 and DCB0160
files.trust_note: Official NHS England page confirming the standards are under review to remain current with healthcare technology and practice.

files.title: SMART App Launch v2.2.0
files.trust_note: Official HL7 implementation guide. This is an interoperability and launch-context standard, not a visual UI design system.

files.title: CDS Hooks v2.0.1
files.trust_note: Official CDS Hooks specification. It defines workflow-triggered decision support payloads and trust concerns, leaving visual rendering mostly to client systems.

files.title: openEHR clinical content models
files.trust_note: openEHR community documentation for Clinical Knowledge Manager and clinical knowledge governance.

files.title: openEHR archetypes and templates
files.trust_note: Official openEHR specification page. Relevant because templates are closely related to form/report structures, but not visual UI guidance.

files.title: O3: The New OpenMRS Explained and the Investments that made it possible
files.source_category: open-source EHR frontend / design system adoption
files.trust_note: Official OpenMRS article. Useful for a modern open-source EHR example using Carbon, React, TypeScript, microfrontends, FHIR, and shared clinical forms.

files.title: VA.gov Design System home
files.trust_note: Official VA.gov design system. Strong patient/veteran-facing government service design, not a clinician-facing EHR UI standard.

files.title: VA.gov Design System health content
files.trust_note: Official VA.gov health-content guidance. Relevant to patient-facing health content, plain language, and risk communication.
